title: Display of empty string appears as space

features.name: $display with %%s format specifier and empty string argument
features.description: Code should include a $display task using the %s format specifier with an empty string literal as the argument

features.name: $write with %%s format specifier and empty string argument
features.description: Code should include a $write task using the %s format specifier with an empty string literal as the argument

features.name: $display with %%s and non-empty string argument
features.description: Code should include a $display task using the %s format specifier with a non-empty string literal as control case
